economic_notes: Papasay Management Limited Partnership holds investments in partnerships and provides contracting equipment and labour services. First Nation operates wood products operations including aggregate inventory and dry kiln under construction. COVID-19 caused temporary office closures and delays in operational and capital projects.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to observe physical aggregate inventory count (carrying value $457,316). Five entities fully consolidated (Papasay Management Corporation, Papasay Value Added Wood Products Ltd., Papasay Value Added Wood Products LP, Wawasum Group Limited, 2626189 Ontario Ltd.) and one GBE on modified equity basis (Papasay Management Limited Partnership). Correction of prior year error of $220,785 applied to opening 2021 accumulated surplus. Non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline noted. Property ownership dispute contingency exists. Budget prepared on unconsolidated basis. Schedule 2 salaries figure appears truncated in source document at $1,320 — full figure likely $1,650,411 as shown in budget column context; used actual 2022 figure of $1,650,411. Health and Social Services segment combines health and social expenses.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
